rss.title: US-Indian Spacecraft Captures Mexico City Subsidence
rss.snippet: Description A scientist produced this map of land subsidence (sinking) in Mexico City using data from the NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar) mission captured between Oct. 25, 2025, and Jan. 17, 2026. arxiv_papers.title: Bayesian power spectrum estimation with modelling of systematic effects in delay-fringe rate space
arxiv_papers.snippet: Observing the Epoch of Reionisation using 21cm radio interferometry has proven to be a challenging task. Extraction of the extremely faint redshifted signal is complicated by the presence of bright foregrounds, radio frequency interference (RFI), and systematic artefacts. We discuss the challenge of

arxiv_papers.title: Charge diffusion and modulation transfer function in a Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope detector
arxiv_papers.snippet: The Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope (Roman) is an observatory motivated by the search to understand dark energy, exoplanets, and general astrophysics.
